generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance DBSCANAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 implementation for data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation for ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring service for real-time display, saving, and reporting vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDisplayInsight, VehicleStateSavingAction, VehicleStateReportingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service for ACC system executed remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service for ACC control commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service for environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides Environment3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation service for vehicle performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsights
]

instance RealTimeDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state"
]

instance VehicleStateSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VehicleStateReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reporting vehicle state for operational insights"
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computation to remote system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance Environment3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment for driver transparency"
]

instance OperationalInsights : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data reports for operational insights"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering control"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium base vehicle"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4, NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna, JetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) from DT to PT, converted to motor voltage commands and steering signals via Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of ≤100 ms as per 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC), User Entity (visualization, control), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); components communicate via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for experimentation and validation, and during operation phase for monitoring and control; covers 'as operated' representation of the physical vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation handles serialization, message type alignment, unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms, clock sync ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and Jetson NX; Digital Twin Entity components deployed on cloud for data storage and computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ACC implementation per ISO 15622 standard; clock synchronization and latency requirements aligned with 3GPP 22.185."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system adhering to ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; maintaining ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization for real-time safety; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
